name: Automated Litigation Mercenary (The Bates Trap)
description: Scrapes massive public court dockets (e.g. PACER), hunting for missing sequential Bates numbers in discovery dumps and temporal contradictions in sworn timelines.

steps.label: Goliath Leviathan: Mass extraction of discovery document dumps
Goliath Gate: Hunt for suppressed sequential numbers and temporal contradictions
VERITAS Sealing: Generate highly structured map of hidden corporate evidence
